criteria.name: Per-entity threshold behaviour
criteria.finding: 4 entities have per-entity thresholds with 3 distinct values: [0.0769230769, 0.3914979757, 0.5263157895]

criteria.name: Cold-start threshold behaviour
criteria.finding: 2 cold-start entities. All use type_level_fallback (0.099393): True. All below min_events=30: True. Entities: [("entity_type='user_host' entity_id='attacker::hospital-server-01'", 4), ("entity_type='user_host' entity_id='attacker::hospital-server-02'", 9)]

criteria.name: Threshold fallback for unseen entity
criteria.finding: Unseen entity fallback: 0.099393 (expected 0.099393, match=True). Per-entity lookup: True. Cold-start lookup: True.
criteria.evidence: compute_ecdf.py:75-80 (get_threshold returns type_level_fallback if entity_key not in dict)

criteria.name: Threshold persistence round-trip
criteria.finding: Round-trip: lossless. All values match exactly.

criteria.name: FPR vs 5% project target
criteria.finding: Mean FPR across 9 scenarios: 4.0% (target < 5%). All below target: True.
